Variable.Name: varVev9DestDir
Variable.Value: If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{28126c7b-be67-41de-a765-bce3a3df5bc5}") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found DV 6.5 registry entries, installation will stop now" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsUpgrade", "true" ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{539d6858-dea7-4bae-be62-5629a44d2f95}") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found DV 6.5 registry entries, installation will stop now" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsUpgrade", "true" ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{58f45911-8fd2-46ad-93c8-38527c015dd4}") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found DV 6.5 registry entries, installation will stop now" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsUpgrade", "true" ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{906dd608-4d16-4700-b50b-4b76741ad65f}") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found DV 6.5 registry entries, installation will stop now" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsUpgrade", "true" ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAP Visual Enterprise Viewer 70") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found VEV 7.0 registry entries, installation will stop now" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsUpgrade", "true" ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAP Visual Enterprise Viewer 71") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found a VEV 7.1 registry entries" strTempPath71 = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP Visual Enterprise Viewer 7.1") strDvOrigDir = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAP Visual Enterprise Viewer 71\InstallLocation") If strDvOrigDir = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: There are leftovers of VEV 7.1" strTempPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") ElseIf strDvOrigDir = strTempPath71 Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: VEV 7.1 is installed in default location " & strTempPath71 strTempPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: VEV 7.1 is installed in non-default location " & strDvOrigDir strTempPath = strDvOrigDir End If NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVev9DestDir", strTempPath NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Default location for VEV 9.0 is " & strTempPath ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{0C4E74D6-FA8F-4F52-A5F6-AC9FAFABC342}") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Found a VEV 8.0 registry entries" strTempPath80 = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") strDvOrigDir = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{0C4E74D6-FA8F-4F52-A5F6-AC9FAFABC342}\InstallLocation") If strDvOrigDir = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: There are leftovers of VEV 8.0" strTempPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") ElseIf strDvOrigDir = strTempPath80 Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: VEV 8.0 is installed in default location " & strTempPath80 strTempPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: VEV 8.0 is installed in non-default location " & strDvOrigDir strTempPath = strDvOrigDir End If NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVev9DestDir", strTempPath NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Default location for VEV 9.0 is " & strTempPath Else strTempPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%ProgramFiles32%\SAP\SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Default location for VEV 9.0 is " & strTempPath NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVev9DestDir", strTempPath End If

Variable.Name: varVevVersion
Variable.Value: Option Explicit Dim path path = "%SapSrcDir%\VE\Viewer\version.txt" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Retrieving version from " & path Dim pathVersion pathVersion = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString(path) Dim version If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist(pathVersion) Then Dim fso Dim file Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") Set file = fso.OpenTextFile(pathVersion, 1) version = file.ReadLine NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: Read version from " & path & ": " & version Else version = NwEngine.Shell.GetFileVersion(NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapSrcDir%\VE\Viewer\x86\VEViewer.exe")) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: File " & path & " cannot be found." End If NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevVersion", version

Variable.Name: varVevIsBlockFileAssoc
Variable.Value: Dim argCollection Set argCollection = NwEngine.Context.Args szProductType = argCollection.Item("Type") If szProductType = "Block" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: File association creation is blocked" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "varVevIsBlockFileAssoc", "true" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "VEV Script: File association creation is allowed" End If
